results.title: Zalo step key semantics cleaned for 5-step flow
results.content: Refactored Zalo i18n step keys to match the actual 5-step flow instead of only changing display text. Domain verification now uses step4Title/Description/Line1-3/RetryNote, webhook setup now uses step5Title/Description/Line1-4/ErrorNote, and the old Zalo step4 generate-webhook keys plus step6 webhook keys were removed from locales. Updated StepDomainVerification and StepEnableWebhook to use the new keys across en/vi/ja/zh/id.

results.title: Frontend ConnectedApp-first migration complete (findtourgoUI)
results.content: nectedAppEntity[]; (7) All channel wizards (Facebook, WhatsApp, Line, Zalo, Inquiry, Email, LiveChat): use primaryChannel?.externalId, primaryChannel?.metadata, appDetails.verifyToken instead of flat channelDetails; (8) URL param channelId now holds connected_app.id in edit mode; (9) POST createChannel returns ConnectChannelResponseModel = {webhookUrl?, verifyToken?, channels[]}; (10) TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors after all changes.

results.title: ConnectChannelUseCase refactor — phân tách private methods
results.content: Refactored ConnectChannelUseCase thành 8 private methods rõ ràng: assertSupportedChannelType, prepareCredentials (tách prepareInquiryCredentials vs prepareStandardCredentials), assertNoDuplicateChannel, resolveAndValidateCredentials, verifyWithProvider, buildChannelEntity, persistChannel, publishEvents. Dùng Set constants NO_WEBHOOK_CHANNEL_TYPES và SKIP_EXTERNAL_VALIDATION_TYPES thay boolean flags rải rác. Import ChannelMetadata cho đúng type trong buildChannelEntity. execute() giờ chỉ còn 9 dòng điều phối. File: src/modules/channels/application/use-cases/connect-channel.use-case.ts

results.title: InboxSidebarProvider readability refactor
results.content: Extracted helper functions and centralized repeated queue/upsert logic in InboxSidebarProvider for better readability with unchanged behavior.

results.title: Facebook webhook GET verification pattern
results.content: Implemented Messenger Verification Requests flow only: parse hub.mode, hub.verify_token, hub.challenge in FacebookWebhookController GET and delegate to VerifyFacebookWebhookUseCase. Use case validates mode=subscribe, channel type FACEBOOK, verify token via WebhookValidatorService, returns plain challenge string. Registered controller and use case in webhooks.module.ts. Kept changes scoped to verification flow only.
